title: EPS load shed
description: Drop non-essential loads to preserve battery during contingency

title: BMS recovery
description: Power-cycle the battery management system and verify telemetry

title: Battery thermal recovery
description: Reduce charging current and engage cooling pathway

title: EPS overvoltage isolation
description: Isolate the offending channel and inspect fault flags

title: ADCS SAFE recovery
description: High-level recovery wrapper: verify state, run detumble, return to NADIR

title: ADCS detumble
description: Execute detumble mode and verify body rates converge

title: Reaction wheel momentum dump
description: Use magnetorquers to bleed off accumulated wheel momentum

title: Star tracker reacquisition
description: Reissue tracking command and verify lock

title: Comm link recovery
description: Stepwise recovery: verify pointing, switch band, increase power

title: BER mitigation
description: Reduce data rate, fall back to redundant TX

title: CDH CPU recovery
description: Identify hung tasks and suspend non-essential workloads

title: CDH memory cleanup
description: Delete temporary files and dump usage report

title: Watchdog investigation
description: Manual checklist + dump memory regions for ground review

title: Memory ECC recovery
description: Dump affected region; if persistent, schedule patch

title: Thermal hot recovery
description: Reduce active loads and verify radiator pathway

title: Thermal cold recovery
description: Enable heaters and monitor return to nominal range

title: Payload thermal hold
description: Suspend imaging until detector cools

title: Payload recovery
description: Power-cycle instrument, run cal, verify nominal operation

title: Payload buffer dump
description: Initiate dump of stored imagery during next contact

title: Propellant tank vent
description: Controlled venting with operator concurrence

title: Low pressure hold
description: Halt burn planning, escalate to engineering review

title: Propellant thermal
description: Enable propellant heater zone and verify warming trend
